title: asterocephalus succisa
side_effects: Asterocephalus succisa can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems in some individuals. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to liver damage and an increased risk of bleeding due to its anticoagulant properties. In addition, improper use of asterocephalus succisa may cause headaches, dizziness, and nausea in some people. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
